summary: Completed frontend testing for F-3 Special Order MTO lifecycle UI and Aftersales/RMA UI features. All UI elements, conditional rendering, permissions, and Credit Note display are working correctly.
passed_tests: Special Order detail page loads correctly with status pills and chips
Already-converted special orders display both SKU chip (data-testid='special-order-linked-sku') and SO chip (data-testid='special-order-linked-so')
Create SKU button (data-testid='special-order-create-sku-btn') and Convert button (data-testid='special-order-convert-btn') are hidden for already-converted orders (idempotent)
Sales user (sales@kainnusantara.id) cannot see create-sku or convert-to-so buttons (correct permission check - only manager/admin can see these buttons)
Returns list table includes 'Nota Kredit' column
Return SRET-00003 displays Credit Note badge (data-testid='return-cn-{id}') with CN-00001 in the table
Return detail page shows Credit Note chip in header (data-testid='return-credit-note-chip') with text 'Nota Kredit: CN-00001'
Return detail page shows Credit Note section (data-testid='return-credit-note-section') with all required fields
Credit Note number displayed correctly (data-testid='credit-note-number'): CN-00001
Credit Note gross amount displayed correctly (data-testid='credit-note-gross'): Rp 925.000
Create Return form includes 'Komplain (keluhan kualitas)' option in Tipe Return select
Create Return form includes 'Garansi (klaim jaminan)' option in Tipe Return select
ReturnTypeBadge renders 'Komplain' with red color (badge-red class) - verified in returns list
ReturnTypeBadge component code correctly maps 'garansi' to badge-teal color
Navigation to Special Orders and Returns works correctly
Demo login buttons work for Manager and Sales users
All data-testid attributes are present and correctly named
